raw_source_reread_reason: Parent batch already preserved the one-file ultra-big orphan shell, the compact two-sequence trajectory contract, the near-inert ent-repeat seam, the dual-split topology4 branch, the ultra3 non-merge boundary, and the diagnostic/proof handoff.
reasons_for_candidate_status: Ultra-big is the correct bounded final result-only orphan and remains structurally distinct from ultra3.
The trajectory branch remains reusable only if Bell-dominant sequence structure stays separate from the smaller sign seam and near-inert ent-repeat seam.
The topology4 branch remains reusable only if its adaptive-vs-fixed and EC-vs-EO splits are preserved together.
The result-only-strip closure remains reusable only if it is kept separate from the still-unfinished diagnostic/proof residue.
reasons_for_quarantine: Catalog visibility is not treated as evidence admission or runner anchoring.
Ent-repeat is not treated as a meaningful stored axis where values are machine-precision invariant.
Sign is not centered over the stronger sequence split.
Topology4 is not flattened into one homogeneous branch.
Result-only exhaustion is not treated as full sims residual completion.
